question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pointe-à-Pitre International Airport will be higher on 2026-01-30 than on 2025-08-03?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78897.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-08-03 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-07-24) was 27.925. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pointe-à-Pitre International Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - LE RAIZET AERO - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78897.D.
